message:
Running command: # Timing repair at iter 150, WNS = -10068 ps (from -20746).
# Rate slowing: -10068 at iter 150 (WNS improved ~500ps/10iter in mid section).
# Still needs to get to ≥ 0. With current critical path, pre-route WNS may not
# reach 0 — that's expected, routing will add ~50% delay.
# Keep monitoring with 10-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -2 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|' | cut -c1-100)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Timing repair at iter 150, WNS = -10068 ps (from -20746).
# Rate slowing: -10068 at iter 150 (WNS improved ~500ps/10iter in mid section).
# Still needs to get to ≥ 0. With current critical path, pre-route WNS may not
# reach 0 — that's expected, routing will add ~50% delay.
# Keep monitoring with 10-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -2 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|' | cut -c1-100)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash
